chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُدَلِّسُ نَفْسَهُ وَ الْعِنِّينِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 67 – The man who cheats and the impotent

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح وآخره مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/160)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح وآخره مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/160)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ امْرَأَةٍ ابْتُلِيَ زَوْجُهَا فَلَا يَقْدِرُ عَلَى الْجِمَاعِ أَ تُفَارِقُهُ قَالَ نَعَمْ إِنْ شَاءَتْ
قَالَ ابْنُ مُسْكَانَ وَ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ تَنْتَظِرُ سَنَةً فَإِنْ أَتَاهَا وَ إِلَّا فَارَقَتْهُ فَإِنْ أَحَبَّتْ أَنْ تُقِيمَ مَعَهُ فَلْتُقِمْ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Ibn Muskan, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a woman who tried her husband, but he was not able upon the copulation, can she separate from him?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, if she so desires it’.

Ibn Muskan (the narrator) said, ‘And in another Hadeeth, ‘(He<sup>asws</sup> said): ‘She would wait for a year. So if he comes to her, or else she separates from him. But, if she loves to stay with him, so let her stay’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from Safwan ibn Yahya from ibn Muskan from abu Basir who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who tries her husband but he is not able to go to bed with her; if they must be separated from each other. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, if she wants separation.’ Ibn Muskan has said that in another Hadith he (the Imam) has said that she must wait for one year and if he still is not able to go to bed with her, she can leave him, but if she likes to stay with him she can do so.’”
